data.name: Big Beautiful Women: Giantess Dating Action
data.detailed_description:
Experience the game made by and for large women enjoyers.

Five years ago, a meteorite crash landed in the Pacific Ocean, causing some women to grow to incredible sizes.

An artificial continent- Jotun-shi- was created to house the new giantesses.

Shortly after moving there, our protagonist reconnects with a long lost childhood friend who has since grown 12 meters tall... and she's only growing taller.

Key Features Include:

  • Over 80 CGs

  • A giant cheerleader

  • Multiple Endings

  • A giant tomboy

  • Lovingly crafted pixel art reminiscent of classic PC98 games

  • A giant milf

  • OST composed by TNH Nebula

If you enjoy larger-than-life ladies, this is the game for you.

data.short_description: If you like big girls, this is the game for you. Play as a college student trying to find love in a city full of giant ladies. 5 lovely ladies to woo, 5 stats to manage, and 10 endings to reach. Can you fall in love before you graduate?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: A potato
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: A potato
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A potato
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: A slightly bigger potato
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: A slightly bigger potato
  • 音效卡: A slightly bigger potato
